quiz.title: Unit 10 Quiz 5
quiz.subtitle: Basic FTC Applications (10 Questions)
quiz.subject: Calculus
quiz.topic: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus - Beginner Level

questions.question: Evaluate \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^x t^2 \, dt\).
questions.explanation: By the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Part 1, \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_a^x f(t) dt = f(x)\). Here \(f(t) = t^2\), so the derivative is \(x^2\).

questions.question: Find \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_2^x \cos t \, dt\).
questions.explanation: By FTC Part 1, \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_a^x f(t) dt = f(x)\). Here \(f(t) = \cos t\), so the derivative is \(\cos x\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_1^x \frac{1}{t} \, dt\).
questions.explanation: By FTC Part 1, \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_a^x f(t) dt = f(x)\). Here \(f(t) = \frac{1}{t}\), so the derivative is \(\frac{1}{x}\).

questions.question: Determine \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_{-1}^x (3t^2 + 2t) \, dt\).
questions.explanation: By FTC Part 1, substitute \(x\) into the integrand: \(3x^2 + 2x\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^x e^t \, dt\).
questions.explanation: By FTC Part 1, \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^x e^t dt = e^x\).

questions.question: Find \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^{x^2} \sin t \, dt\).
questions.explanation: Let \(u = x^2\). By the Chain Rule and FTC: \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^{u} \sin t dt = \sin(u) \cdot \frac{du}{dx} = \sin(x^2) \cdot 2x = 2x \sin(x^2)\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^{\sqrt{x}} t^3 \, dt\).
questions.explanation: Let \(u = \sqrt{x} = x^{1/2}\), \(\frac{du}{dx} = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{x}}\). Then \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_0^{u} t^3 dt = u^3 \cdot \frac{1}{2\sqrt{x}} = (x^{1/2})^3 \cdot \frac{1}{2x^{1/2}} = x^{3/2} \cdot \frac{1}{2x^{1/2}} = \frac{x}{2}\).

questions.question: Find \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_{x}^{2} t^4 \, dt\).
questions.explanation: Recall that \(\frac{d}{dx} \int_{x}^{a} f(t) dt = -\frac{d}{dx} \int_{a}^{x} f(t) dt = -f(x)\). Thus the derivative is \(-x^4\).

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You've mastered the basics of FTC.
scoreMessages.70: Good work! You understand FTC fundamentals. Review the chain rule applications.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing! Focus on FTC Part 1 and the Chain Rule with variable limits.
scoreMessages.0: Review the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus Part 1 and practice derivatives of integrals.
